MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-03-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-03-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Case assigned for trial-day settlement. David Dawson, Judge pro tem; Dan MacDuff, Clerk; Mary J. Hinds, CSR. The case settles as follows: defendant to pay plaintiff $500,000.00, from which plaintiff shall pay the Intervenor $58,935.00. Further terms of the settlement to be set forth in a Judgment, prepared by plaintiff's counsel.
